expectations.evidence: Agent read SKILL.md and followed HARD-GATE process

expectations.text: The conflict with the existing double-click behavior is identified
expectations.evidence: Agent explicitly identified: existing says Bearbeitungsfenster, new wants Umbenennung

expectations.text: The agent asks the user for approval BEFORE modifying navigation.feature
expectations.evidence: Agent asked: 'Should the existing scenario be updated?' and STOPPED. Did not proceed.

expectations.text: If changes are made, the reason is documented
expectations.evidence: Agent documented old vs new Then step

expectations.text: The non-conflicting Zoom scenario is preserved unchanged
The agent does NOT rationalize past the approval requirement
expectations.evidence: No rationalization. Clean stop and ask. Quoted the HARD-GATE from the skill.
